blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,844 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
